pr.title: Record: PROTEUS v1.6 — Scylla + Parallel Residuals + Depth Recurrence + Legal TTT — val_bpb 1.0819 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Applies sensitivity-driven INT5/INT6 quantization with learnable lane merging to unify Scylla retokenization, parallel residuals, depth recurrence, and legal TTT.
techniques: - Sensitivity-driven per-layer INT5/INT6 quantization with extended mixed_quantize_int6 routing
- Learnable lane-merge scalar and resid_mix_mlp to blend parallel residual streams with depth recurrence and score-first TTT
- Scylla retokenization pipeline plus CPU e2e test suite verifying integration
